content.description: Redirect bin/build.sh, bin/herald.sh, and bin/scribe.sh to delegate through bin/dispatch.sh via exec. These scripts previously invoked agents directly (claude -p --agent <name>), bypassing the Dispatcher and violating invariant 2 (single entry point). Now each script calls dispatch.sh with the appropriate operator, preserving their public interface while routing through the unified dispatcher. Applied to both the main project and the coco worktree copies.
